title: ixeris integra
intro: Ixeris integra, also known as Japanese dandelion or Asian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that promotes gut health. Consuming Ixeris integra can lead to various health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Ixeris integra is often used as a tea, dried root, or tincture to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms associated with liver and gallbladder disorders.
